query: SELECT e.id, e.title, e.videoUrl, e.seriesId, e.seasonNumber, e.episodeNumber, s.title as seriesTitle FROM episodes e JOIN series s ON e.seriesId = s.id ORDER BY e.seriesId, e.seasonNumber, e.episodeNumber
